use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ACTINIC KERATOSES BY PHOTODYNAMIC THERAPY

TOPICAL LESION-DIRECTED AND FIELD-DIRECTED TREATMENT OF ACTINIC KERATOSIS OF THE FACE AND SCALP WITH PHOTODYNAMIC THERAPY BY POSITIONING AN ILLUMINATION DEVICE IN AN APPROPRIATE DISTANCE AND ILLUMINATING THE TREATMENT AREA WITH NARROWBAND RED LIGHT
